title: MS: Click the Base Peak
bodyText: Click the base peak, the tallest signal in the mass spectrum.

figures.description: Mock placeholder: normally this would show an EI mass spectrum with the base peak at m/z 43 and smaller fragments at higher m/z values.

feedbacks: Correct: m/z 43 is the base peak.
Not quite. The base peak is the tallest bar, located at m/z 43.
